data.title: Co-Founder & CEO Ishan Patel of Audien Hearing recognized by Goldman Sachs at 2025 Builders and Innovators Summit.
data.description: Ishan Patel, the Co-Founder and CEO of Audien Hearing, has been acknowledged as one of the most exceptional entrepreneurs at the 2025 Builders and Innovators Summit in Scottsdale, Arizona. This recognition comes from Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS), who highlighted Patel's achievements during the event held on October 16, 2025. Patel's leadership and contributions to Audien Hearing have earned him this prestigious recognition among his peers in the industry.

data.title: NYU Langone Health's Transplant Institute ranks top for liver & kidney transplants in NY, with fast heart & lung rates.
data.description: As of October 16, 2025, the NYU Langone Transplant Institute has been recognized as the leading program in New York for liver and kidney transplants, boasting some of the highest rates of successful heart and lung transplants in the country. Recent national data indicates the institute's exceptional performance in these areas. The institution's dedication to advancing transplantation techniques and achieving outstanding outcomes is evident in the numbers, solidifying its position as a top-tier medical facility for critical organ transplants.

data.title: Intelligent Power launches new Wide Temp Series LiFePO₄ battery for North America, durable in -40°F to 185°F temp range.
data.description: LINDON, Utah-based company Intelligent Power has unveiled its latest product, the Wide Temp Series lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO₄) battery designed for tough outdoor conditions. This advanced battery features a unique anode and electrolyte blend, allowing it to function seamlessly in temperatures ranging from -40°F to 185°F (-40°C to +85°C) without requiring additional heaters, insulation, or complex thermal protection systems. This development cements Intelligent Power's position as a frontrunner in extreme-temperature battery technology.

data.title: MGT, AI Neo-Insurer, closes $21.6M Series B funding led by Mubadala Capital, to revolutionize commercial insurance.
data.description: In San Francisco, MGT, an AI-focused neo-insurer for small businesses, has successfully completed a Series B funding round, raising $21.6 million. The round, oversubscribed, was spearheaded by Mubadala Capital along with Clocktower Ventures and Tacora Capital, as well as contributions from existing investors. This capital injection will support MGT in its objective to provide improved and quicker insurance solutions tailored for small businesses.

data.title: Chiquita showcases immersive experiences at IFPA 2025 with innovative brand innovations. Fla., Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: On October 17-18, the International Fresh Produce Association Global Produce & Floral Show will take place in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Chiquita will be participating in the event, showcasing their products and representing their brand. The show is expected to attract industry professionals from around the world and is a prime opportunity for networking and business transactions. This year, the event will feature an array of exhibitors and is anticipated to draw a considerable number of attendees. Chiquita's presence at the show signifies their commitment to the fresh produce industry and their dedication to engaging with stakeholders.

data.title: OPTERRA Energy Services is a finalist for the NAESCO "Project of the Year" Award for their project with Broward County, Florida. The project focuses on energy efficiency in public spaces like libraries and parks.
data.description: In Oakland, California, OPTERRA Energy Services revealed that its collaboration with Broward County in Florida has been chosen as a finalist for the prestigious National Association of Energy Service Companies (NAESCO) "Project of the Year" Award. This recognition highlights exceptional accomplishments in energy efficiency and the upgrading of public infrastructure. Broward County's project, targeting public libraries, parks, transit hubs, and government buildings, has emerged as a leading example of innovative energy solutions. The project stands out as a model for other local entities to follow.

data.title: Consumer Reports study shows MuscleTech® as only protein powder with no detectable lead, setting industry standard.
data.description: In Toronto on October 16, 2025, Iovate Health Sciences International Inc. was acknowledged for its exceptional purity standards through third-party testing, showcasing no trace of lead. The renowned sports nutrition brand, MuscleTech®, under Iovate, received recognition for this achievement. This recognition was highlighted in Consumer Reports, demonstrating the industry-leading quality assurance practices upheld by the company. This significant accomplishment emphasizes the dedication of Iovate in ensuring product safety and purity standards.

data.title: Conexon Connect has a customer satisfaction score of +79, with 100,000+ subscribers, far above industry average of +16.
data.description: A rapidly expanding internet service provider, Conexon Connect, based in KANSAS CITY, Mo., revealed it now serves more than 100,000 subscribers. The company has achieved a remarkable customer satisfaction rating of +79, overshadowing the industry's average of +16. This announcement was made on Oct. 16, 2025. Conexon Connect operates as a part of Conexon, a prominent provider of rural fiber broadband services.
